title: Claims Analyst
description:
Honeywell is a Fortune 100 diversified technology and manufacturing company serving aerospace, buildings, and industrial sectors globally.

We're seeking a Claims Analyst to join our Industrial team in Phoenix. This role offers the opportunity to contribute meaningfully to our mission while developing your professional skills in a collaborative environment.
responsibilities: Investigate and process insurance claims for accuracy and policy compliance
Review claim documentation and verify coverage eligibility
Communicate with claimants, healthcare providers, and third parties to resolve discrepancies
Document findings and maintain detailed claim records in management systems
Identify patterns in claims data and report fraud indicators
Meet processing timelines while maintaining high accuracy standards

requirements.education: High school diploma or equivalent; Associate's degree in Business preferred
requirements.experience_years: 2-4 years in claims processing, insurance, or risk management
